data.name: colExactMatch.ToolTip
data.value: Use this option if you do not require to search for similar records. Most common uses for exact matching are email addresses, telephone numbers, ZIP codes etc, and also the processing is much quicker than using fuzzy match

data.name: toolTipTitleItem9.Text
data.value: Direct: In Direct mode, the software checks each rule one at a time, in the order you've set. This order can affect the results, so it’s important to carefully arrange the rules at the start to get the best match. This mode allows for more control over how matches are found but requires some attention to rule ordering. Mixed: In Mixed mode, all the rules are checked at once, so the order you set is less important. This mode is useful if you don’t need precise control over rule sequence, though it may take a bit longer to process due to the simultaneous checks.
